bundleRuntime.description: The hermetic Claude Design runtime: <stateId>.html loads ../_ds/_ds_bundle.js + _<feat>-screen.jsx + _<feat>-data.jsx and self-mounts. (The babel-canvas/esbuild-iife adapters of the local proof are retired — authored frames are self-mounting plain JS.)

logicalWidthCss.description: CSS width the frame is authored at (e.g. 411 to match a w411dp subject capture).

dpr.description: Device pixel ratio (e.g. 3 → xxhdpi; 411*3=1233px to match the subject capture).

stateIdMeta.description: The <meta name="…"> tag carrying the state-id identity stamp in each frame. Project convention (e.g. 'sb-state-id'); pull keys off it.

gateCommandTemplate.description: FULL shell command for the app-owned Tier-2 self-regression gate (the framework is gate-tool-agnostic — any Compose screenshot regression tool / device capture works). {module} (captureDir's first segment) and {stateId} are substituted. Omit to run advisory-only (no Tier-2 gate). Example (Gradle): 'cd app-dir && ./gradlew :{module}:feature:verifyScreenshots'.

dsRuntimeSource.description: configDir-relative dir of this project's committed design-system render runtime (_ds_bundle.js, styles.css, tokens/, fonts/) served at /_ds/. Hash-anchored to the uploaded canvas _ds/. (Climb out with ../ or use an absolute path to reference a runtime built elsewhere in the repo.)

dsRuntimeHash.description: Optional pinned sha256 of _ds_bundle.js (pull verifies the local runtime matches the upload).

framesRoot.description: Repo-relative dir holding <module>/<stateId>.html frames (+ the shared _<feat>-screen/data.jsx).

clipHeight.description: OPTIONAL (CSS px): clip a tall scrollable design to the subject's fixed viewport height for the grading capture; natural height is preserved in the manifest and verify flags belowFoldRisk. No-op when the design fits.

tokensSource.description: OPTIONAL: path (configDir-relative) to a machine-readable design-token palette — CSS custom properties (--name: #hex | rgb/a()) or flat JSON {name: hex}. Enables intake's nearest-token pairing evidence.

paletteSnapThreshold.description: OPTIONAL (default 40): euclidean RGB distance under which intake's nearest-token pairing reports withinThreshold.

gridStepDp.description: OPTIONAL (default 8): the dp step of intake's grid-overlay measuring variant.

paletteTopN.description: OPTIONAL (default 24): how many census colors intake reports/pairs.
